title: Faster Climbing
description:
You can climb faster on:

Ladders, Vines, Weeping Vines, Twisting Vines, Scaffolding and
any other block marked as climbable by Minecraft.
body:
Fast Climbing makes climbing faster and smoother on ladders, vines, weeping vines, twisting vines, scaffolding, and other climbable blocks.

Hold Space to climb up quickly. Look down and hold W to descend quickly on ladders and vines. On scaffolding, use Space to climb up and Shift to go down. The mod also includes configurable speed, an enable/disable toggle, and English/Russian language support based on the selected game language.
